children.name: Craterolophus
children.description: Craterolophus — a genus of craterolophid stalked jellyfish in the family Craterolophidae.

children.name: Craterolophus convolvulus
children.description: Craterolophus convolvulus — a species in the genus Craterolophus, family Craterolophidae. Also known as craterolophid stalked jellyfish.

children.name: Craterolophus macrocystis
children.description: Craterolophus macrocystis — a species in the genus Craterolophus, family Craterolophidae. Also known as craterolophid stalked jellyfish.
